metadata.description: RagaliQ live demo - one honest answer, one with a made-up fact

test_cases.name: Honest answer (should PASS / green)
test_cases.query: What is the capital of France?
context: France is a country in Western Europe. Its capital city is Paris.
test_cases.response: The capital of France is Paris.

test_cases.name: Answer with a made-up fact (should FAIL / red)
test_cases.query: What is the capital of France?
context: France is a country in Western Europe. Its capital city is Paris.
test_cases.response: The capital of France is Paris, a city of 90 million people that was founded by Napoleon in 1620.
